name: Lion
description: King of the Queue. If another Lion exists in the queue, the new Lion is sent to Trash. If a Monkey exists, it is also removed. Then Lion moves to the front of the queue.
example:
Before: Hippo > Monkey > Lion
After: Lion > Hippo

name: Hippo
description: Heavy Push. Moves forward by passing all cards with power lower than 11 until it reaches a stronger card or a Zebra.
example:
Before: Lion > Zebra > Monkey > Hippo
After: Lion > Zebra > Hippo > Monkey

name: Crocodile
description: Predator. Moves forward and eats all weaker cards (power < 10). Stops when it reaches Zebra or a stronger card.
example:
Before: Lion > Zebra > Monkey > Crocodile
After: Lion > Zebra > Crocodile
(Monkey is removed)

name: Snake
description: Chaos Order. Sorts the entire queue from highest power to lowest power.
example:
Before: Monkey > Lion > Zebra > Snake
After: Lion > Snake > Zebra > Monkey

name: Giraffe
description: Jump Over. Moves forward exactly one position in the queue.
example:
Before: Lion > Hippo > Giraffe
After: Lion > Giraffe > Hippo

name: Zebra
description: Barrier. Blocks Hippo and Crocodile from passing.
example:
Before: Lion > Zebra > Hippo
After: Lion > Zebra > Hippo (Hippo cannot pass)

name: Seal
description: Reverse World. Reverses the entire queue order.
example:
Before: Lion > Hippo > Zebra > Seal
After: Seal > Zebra > Hippo > Lion

name: Sloth Bear
description: Sticky. Does not move. If a Lion or Hippo passes over it, it attaches behind that card.
example:
Before: Sloth Bear > Lion
After: Lion > Sloth Bear

name: Parrot
description: Remove Strongest. Removes the two strongest cards in the queue. Parrot stays.
example:
Before: Lion > Hippo > Zebra > Parrot
After: Zebra > Parrot (Lion and Hippo are removed)

name: Kangaroo
description: Jump. Moves forward by jumping 1 or 2 positions depending on space.
example:
Before: Lion > Zebra > Kangaroo
After (2-step jump): Kangaroo > Lion > Zebra

name: Monkey
description: Group Effect. If this is the second Monkey in the queue, it triggers a global effect that removes all Crocodiles and Hippos and moves them to the front.
example:
Before: Hippo > Lion > Monkey > Crocodile > Monkey
After: Hippo > Crocodile > Lion > Monkey > Monkey

name: Weasel
description: Clean Strong. Removes the two strongest cards in the queue.
example:
Before: Lion > Hippo > Monkey > Weasel
After: Monkey > Weasel (Lion and Hippo are removed)
